name: sokosumi-cli
description: CLI for Sokosumi agents, coworkers, and automation workflows

scripts.smoke:imports: node --input-type=module -e "await import('./src/app.mjs'); await import('./src/cli/index.mjs'); await import('./src/components/select-input.mjs'); await import('./src/views/agents-view.mjs'); await import('./src/views/coworkers-view.mjs'); await import('./src/views/auth-setup-view.mjs'); await import('./src/auth/magic-link.mjs'); console.log('imports-ok')"
